Title: Field technician hiring and training

Owner: Operations lead

Description:
Hire and train field technicians. Use `support/FIELD_TRAINING_GUIDE.md` to run a 3-day workshop, verify skills (equipment, interviews, data validation), and onboard staff.

Acceptance criteria:
- 4 technicians hired and background-checked
- Training workshop completed and checklist signed
- Devices configured with required software and VPN access

Labels: operations, high-priority
